outlines.title: Unresolved Source
outlines.logline: Mira follows a clue outside the available evidence.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira opens a file that the provided evidence does not contain.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must challenge Rowan with evidence the store cannot resolve.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira realizes the claim needs verification.
outlines.cliffhanger: The missing chapter is cited as proof.
